title: Task outcome: Fix DinoBrain installer/config writer to prevent malformed carriage returns in <machine-local-path>
summary: Fixed the installer Codex config writer so malformed carriage returns cannot corrupt <machine-local-path> Added CRLF normalization before TOML block rewriting, byte-level bare CR checks after write, DinoBrain TOML block shape validation, and a regression case that starts from a malformed config containing CRCRLF and bare CR. Bumped DinoBrain to v2.2.1 and pushed main/tag.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Fixed the installer Codex config writer so malformed carriage returns cannot corrupt <machine-local-path> Added CRLF normalization before TOML block rewriting, byte-level bare CR checks after write, DinoBrain TOML block shape validation, and a regression case that starts from a malformed config containing CRCRLF and bare CR. Bumped DinoBrain to v2.2.1 and pushed main/tag.
request: Fix DinoBrain installer/config writer to prevent malformed carriage returns in <machine-local-path> by normalizing line endings, checking for bare CR, and validating TOML after write.
decisions: Treat this as an installer bug, not a path or quoting bug.
Normalize existing config text before section removal and block append.
Validate the final DinoBrain TOML block before and after writing, and reject bare CR bytes at the file level.
Bump patch version to 2.2.1 and tag it because this affects installer safety.
next_steps: GitHub Release asset upload still requires GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN or another release upload path; local ZIP was prepared with -SkipUpload.

Bumped DinoBrain to v2.2.1 and pushed main/tag.
